name: Chinese Paddlefish
conservationEfforts: Declared functionally extinct in 2019 and officially extinct in 2022. The Gezhouba Dam blocked migration routes in 1981. Despite decades of conservation attempts, the species could not be saved.
description: Once one of the world's largest freshwater fish at 7 meters long, the Chinese paddlefish was declared extinct in 2022. The last confirmed sighting was in 2003. Dam construction on the Yangtze sealed its fate.
